svg.title: How BioMedArena Processes an RNA-seq Research Question
svg.desc: A five-step workflow diagram showing case input, setup, iterative tool use, context management, and answer scoring in BioMedArena.
svg.text: How BioMedArena Processes an RNA-seq Research Question: From Input to Answer in 5 Steps

text.tspan: No code or analysis details required.
You are a biomedical research agent.
Use the provided tools when helpful.
System configures both prompt and toolkit,
not just one prompt to the LLM.
Multi-round function-calling loop: agent calls tools,
updates scratchpad, and plans the next iteration.

g.text: System compresses and summarizes context on-the-fly, keeping key memory.
3 iter - 12 tool calls - 1 compression event (illustrative trace)
